themes.name: Agentic AI in research
themes.description: Covers AI agents designed to autonomously perform research tasks, including data collection, analysis, and experimentation.

themes.name: AI coding assistants
themes.description: Focuses on AI tools that assist developers with writing, debugging, reviewing, and generating code.

themes.name: AI summarization
themes.description: Articles discussing AI's ability to condense large amounts of text, such as meeting notes, research papers, or user feedback, into concise summaries.

themes.name: AI research tools
themes.description: Encompasses AI-powered tools and platforms specifically designed to aid user researchers in various aspects of their work.

themes.name: AI chatbot research
themes.description: Explores the use, capabilities, and implications of AI chatbots in research, user interaction, and information retrieval.

themes.name: AI for design and research
themes.description: Examines how AI is being integrated into design processes and workflows to enhance creativity and efficiency in research.

themes.name: AI sentiment feedback
themes.description: Covers AI applications for analyzing and understanding user sentiment and feedback from various sources.

themes.name: AI recruitment research
themes.description: Focuses on how AI is used in the recruitment process, including identifying candidates, assessing skills, and analyzing job market impacts.

themes.name: AI usability testing
themes.description: Discusses the use of AI to automate or enhance usability testing processes for digital products and services.

themes.name: AI customer insights
themes.description: Articles that explore how AI is used to gather, analyze, and derive insights from customer data and behavior.

note: Themes identified by analyzing articles from curated sources, Google News, HackerNews, and DEV.to this month.
